evals.prompt: Look at the cards on my Hearthstone account and tell me which current competitive Standard deck would be easiest for me to build.
evals.expected_output: Explains how to obtain the collection (HSReplay/HDT/Firestone), gathers current top Standard decks with deckstrings, runs rank_decks.py, and recommends the cheapest competitive deck with missing cards and dust cost.

evals.prompt: Here is my HSReplay collection export and a list of tier-1 deck codes. Which can I build for the least dust?
evals.expected_output: Normalizes the HSReplay collection JSON, ranks the provided decks by dust needed, and reports the cheapest option plus percent owned and missing legendaries.

evals.prompt: I have about 4000 dust to spend. Which meta Standard deck should I craft?
evals.expected_output: Uses --budget to filter completable decks, balances dust against win rate/tier, and gives a concrete recommendation with the deckstring to import.
